description: Style NoteAdd a desi dimension to your global-glam ensemble with this lovely pair of earrings from royal diadem. A statement piece is a fashion essential - style this with minimal additional accessories for maximum effect. This pair packs a definite ethnic punch which means you can use this to dress up a simple salwar suit or a monochrome sari. Invest in this pair and you'll find that the statement jewellery trend will outlast the season. Product DetailsGolden coloured earring Flower shaped base with a pointy top, has pearl like bead detail on it with an oval brown coloured stone in the centreA loop at the end of the base with a white bead dangler attached with white bead encrusted hook, small white bead and brown stone detailing on top of the white bead danglerPush back closureMaterial and CareMetalWipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength: 71 mm
